description: The acoustics team has requested an evaluation of a 3-blade propeller to replace the current 2-blade design for our electric UAV. Open the baseline model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/baseline_prop.vsp3 in OpenVSP. First, change the Propeller's number of blades (NumBlades) from 2 to 3 and save the model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/3blade_prop.vsp3. Next, navigate to Analysis > Propeller BEM to open the PropBEM tool. Configure a performance sweep for the Advance Ratio (J) from 0.1 to 1.5 using exactly 15 points, then run the analysis. Locate the resulting PropBEM CSV output file, parse it to find the peak (maximum) efficiency and its corresponding Advance Ratio (J). Finally, write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/prop_report.txt containing the peak efficiency and optimal J value.
